title: rosa canina var. vicina
intro: Rosa canina var. vicina, also known as the Wild Rose or Dog Rose, is a deciduous shrub native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant is rich in vitamins, flavonoids, and anthocyanins, which contribute to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa canina var. vicina include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as supporting the immune system and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
